transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Did you make an appointment at the writing center?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes, they had one opening this afternoon, so I reserved it immediately.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the woman reserve the appointment immediately?

questions.prompt: Why did the woman reserve the appointment immediately?

choices.text: She wanted to avoid waiting for another opening.

questions.explanation: She says there was only one opening, so she reserved it right away.
questions.evidence: They had one opening this afternoon, so I reserved it immediately.
